color.palette_type: warm paper neutrals + a pastel 'construction paper' family; near-black ink; color arrives as big tinted section panels, not as accents on text
color.ink: #030302 (near-black, used for text, logo, solid buttons)
color.ink_muted: rgba(3,3,2,0.75) — body copy runs at 75% opacity ink

panel_pastels.sky_blue: hero/pricing/download/imagine panels — light azure with paper grain, roughly #a8d3f0-#bfe0f5
panel_pastels.mint_green: #a9d9a8-range — IMAGINE section, 'Let's get started' CTA panel
panel_pastels.pastel_pink / lilac: template panels, torn-paper scraps, note-card mockups
panel_pastels.note: each pastel panel carries a visible paper-grain texture; in-panel cards shift to a lighter tint of the same hue

color.brand_orange: #f5a623 solid base for the promo banner, deepening to burnt orange at the edges with glowing dot ornaments; darker orange #b96d1e-range promo pills
color.black_surfaces: footer and 'Craft Plus' pricing card are pure black rounded panels with white text and white blobby logo
color.semantic_note: no traditional semantic palette on the marketing site; system blue appears only inside product-UI mockups (checkboxes, 'Today' chips)
color.contrast_strategy: near-black ink on cream or pastel; large surfaces carry the color while text stays black/white; muted 75%-opacity ink for supporting copy

typography.display_font: Untitled Serif (Klim) — 'UntitledSerifFont'; ALL headlines h1/h2, prices, quotes; loads Source Serif 4 + Noto Serif SC as fallbacks
typography.body_font: Untitled Sans (Klim) — 'UntitledSansFont'; body, nav, buttons, labels; Inter + Noto Sans SC fallbacks
typography.mono_font: none — no monospace anywhere; caps labels are Untitled Sans

scale_observed.h2: 54px / 400 / lh 59.4px / ls -1.08px (-0.02em), serif — identical across every section
scale_observed.caps_labels: 13-14px sans 500, uppercase, letterspaced (section eyebrows WRITE/PLAN/IMAGINE/ORGANIZE, persona names, PLUS/FAMILY/TEAM, footer column titles)

typography.weight_discipline: serif never exceeds 400 — hierarchy comes from size and italic, not weight; sans uses 400/500 only
typography.italic_as_voice: serif italic is the signature move: highlighted words inside roman headlines ('it's for *your* things', '*Imagine* the possibilities'), whole second lines ('Master Craft / *in under an hour*'), every testimonial quote, persona descriptions, and the sale banner ('*Summer Sale → Get 40% off…*')
typography.logo: 'CRAFT' as fat blobby black hand-drawn letterforms (image/svg wordmark, not a set font); white version on black surfaces

spacing.density: airy marketing rhythm; near-viewport-height panels with big cream gaps between them; in-panel cards get generous 24-32px padding
spacing.page_gutter: full-bleed panels are inset ~20px from the viewport edge on all sides (page reads as stacked rounded 'sheets' on a cream desk)
spacing.section_rhythm: cream background sections (awards, quotes, template carousel) alternate with saturated paper panels

layout.page_anatomy_home: orange sale banner → floating pill nav → sky-blue collage hero panel → cream section: serif claim + 5 icon features (Docs/Tasks/Calendar/Whiteboards/Daily Notes) → 'How people use Craft' persona card carousel → periwinkle WRITE panel → serif italic quote → green IMAGINE panel (MCP/API integration tiles) → yellow PLAN panel (Calendar/Tasks/Journal/Reminders cards) → awards row → quote → ORGANIZE trio of pastel cards → 'Make it unmistakably yours' → template card carousel → quote → 'Stay in the loop' community → pricing preview (white Free card + black Plus card) → green 'Let's get started' CTA panel → black rounded footer
layout.section_panel_pattern: each capability gets a full-width rounded pastel panel: caps eyebrow + serif heading + sans body + tinted glassy pill 'Learn more' on the left, product-UI mockup cards on the right (sides alternate)
layout.nav: floating white pill (26px radius, blur(4px) glass, subtle shadow) containing blobby logo + text links + 'Log in' + black pill CTA; it stays pinned and its glass tints to whatever panel scrolls beneath
layout.mega_menu: nav pill expands into a large frosted-glass rounded panel: grid of translucent tile buttons (Plan/Write/Organize/Customize with sketchy icons + one-line serif-adjacent descriptions) plus a right rail (What's New, Imagine, Help and Support, Blog)
layout.footer: black 32px-radius panel: caps column titles over hairline rules (PRODUCT/COMMUNITY/SUPPORT/COMPANY/DOWNLOAD), white 16px links, locale switcher, boxed social icons
layout.alignment: headlines centered on hero/subpages; panel content left-aligned; testimonial quotes left with right-floated avatar + name + hairline rule

shape.radius_scale: pill (9999px) for every button/chip/badge; 24px for cards; 26px nav pill; 32px for the big section panels and footer
shape.buttons: all pills: primary = solid near-black #030302 with white 16px/500 label (36-48px tall); secondary = glassy translucent white ('glass sticker') with soft drop shadow + inner highlight, tinted by the panel behind it; black pills also used as small utility buttons (Download/App Store rows)
shape.torn_edges: torn/ripped paper silhouettes are a core shape motif — panel bottoms and collage scraps have irregular deckled edges (image assets), deliberately breaking the rounded-rect system
shape.border_usage: almost none — separation via surface color, soft shadows, and hairline rules under caps labels; dotted hairlines between download rows

elevation.philosophy: soft, toy-like depth: panels sit on the cream page like stacked paper sheets with wide soft shadows; buttons look like puffy glass stickers with highlight + shadow; mockup cards float with gentle diffuse shadows
elevation.no_hard_borders: depth is always shadow/tint, never outline

motion.observed: gentle and sparse: carousels (personas, templates) slide horizontally; nav glass tints on scroll; hover lifts on pills; no scroll-jacking, no parallax, no reveal choreography detected; no framer-motion/lenis globals found
motion.philosophy: calm — the collage art carries the energy, the page itself barely moves

components.sale_banner: full-width orange gradient strip, serif italic message with '→', glowing dot ornaments at both ends
components.primary_cta: 'Try Craft Free' black pill, white 16px/500 text, 36px in nav / 48px+ in heroes; hero variant is a frosted glass pill on the collage
components.glass_button: translucent panel-tinted pill ('Learn more', 'Continue on web', 'Contact us', 'Search Templates') with soft shadow — reads as a glass sticker on the paper panel
components.persona_cards: rounded portrait photo cards on collage backgrounds (torn paper, halftone dots, colored fields) + caps name/role ('AARON, WRITER AND PODCASTER') + serif italic use-case line
components.quote_block: 32px serif italic quote in curly quotes + small round avatar + gray name + long hairline rule
components.pricing_cards: white rounded Free card vs pure-black Plus card (white blobby CRAFT logo + white pill 'PLUS' badge); caps tier labels; serif prices (¥740) with gray strikethrough original; yearly/monthly segmented pill toggle; wide 'Bigger group?' bar card with sketchy group icon
components.integration_tiles: white rounded tiles holding grids of real app icons (MCP connections, API integrations); pastel-tinted pill chips for starter templates ('Blog Publisher', 'Dream Journal')
components.awards_row: 3D-rendered award icons (App Store, Apple Design Awards, Webby, German Design Award) + bold sans caption + gray subline
components.filter_chips: white pill chips with icon + label + chevron (Series/Features/Recommended) and a Grid/List segmented pill toggle
components.mockups: faux Craft app windows everywhere: pastel note cards (pink/yellow/green/blue), checklists with blue checkboxes, calendar 'Today' cards, journal entries — always on-brand pastel, never gray screenshots
components.icons: hand-sketched line icons (wobbly pencil strokes) for features: docs, tasks, calendar, whiteboards scribble-e, pencil, pencil-cup on /learn — no geometric icon set

design_style.personality: a paper-craft scrapbook made by a meticulous studio — literally 'craft': torn construction paper, halftone clouds, sketchy pencil icons, sticker-like glass buttons; joy is the explicit pitch ('bringing the joy back to thinking')
design_style.genre: consumer productivity-app marketing, anti-corporate; the deliberate opposite of grayscale dev-tool minimalism (contrast with vercel.json) — closer to a picture-book take on Notion's category
design_style.visual_language: collage: torn paper scraps (periwinkle, gray, black, legal-pad yellow with green rules), paper-grain textures on every colored surface (paper-texture.webp + SVG feTurbulence noise), halftone-dot clouds drifting over cream pages, blue skies, polaroid photo piles (blog), 3D award trophies; serif type gives it an editorial, bookish warmth
design_style.composition: stacked rounded 'paper sheets': the page is a cream desk on which full-width textured panels, carousels, and quote interludes are laid out in a steady vertical rhythm; centered serif headlines open pages, alternating left/right content fills panels
design_style.imagery: illustrated collage art + real product-UI mockups recolored into brand pastels + genuine user photos (personas, testimonial avatars, team polaroids); app icons of integrated tools shown as-is; zero stock photography
design_style.ornamentation: rich but handmade: torn edges, paper grain, halftone dots, sketchy icons, glowing banner dots, wavy tonal patterns inside green CTA panels — ornamental texture everywhere, yet the type system stays strict (serif 400 + sans 400/500 only)
design_style.whitespace_philosophy: cream breathing room between saturated panels; panels themselves are dense with playful detail
design_style.copy_voice: warm, second-person, benefit-led with wit ('Craft isn't just for one thing, it's for *your* things', 'Planning that doesn't feel like work', 'Your pace, your plan', 'Master Craft in under an hour'); italics do the emotional emphasis; CTAs are friendly invitations ('Try Craft Free', 'Let's get started')
design_style.interaction_feel: soft and tactile — puffy glass pills that beg to be pressed, gentle hover lifts, sliding carousels; nothing snappy or mechanical

overview.effect_intensity: moderate — but achieved through art assets and texture, not runtime rendering
overview.performance_tier: lightweight — no canvas, no WebGL, no video on any page checked (verified 0 canvas/video elements); effects are webp/SVG assets + CSS
overview.composite_notes: The signature look is layered static collage: paper-grain texture (paper-texture.webp) tiled over pastel panel colors, an inline SVG feTurbulence noise filter, halftone-dot cloud PNGs floating at section edges, torn-paper-edge image masks on panel boundaries, and glassmorphic UI chrome (nav pill, mega-menu, buttons) blurring whatever colorful panel scrolls beneath. Rich visual result, near-zero runtime cost.

paper_texture.details: every colored panel carries visible paper grain: paper-texture.a0b2b1ca.webp background-image plus an SVG feTurbulence noise filter; cream page background also subtly warm-textured

torn_paper_collage.details: torn/deckle-edge paper scraps as hero art and panel-edge masks (periwinkle/gray/black/yellow-legal-pad on /, yellow+lilac+periwinkle spilling from the pricing panel); the CRAFT ghost letters watermark sits faintly in the hero sky

halftone_clouds.details: paper-cutout clouds with halftone dot shading drift at panel corners and over cream sections on every page — the recurring brand ornament

glassmorphism.details: floating nav pill: 26px radius, backdrop blur(4px), tints toward the section behind it; Product mega-menu is a large frosted rounded panel of translucent tiles; secondary buttons are translucent 'glass sticker' pills with inner highlight + soft shadow

gradient_banner.details: orange sale banner: solid #f5a623 core deepening toward burnt-orange edges with two glowing dot ornaments; serif italic copy

carousels.details: horizontal card carousels for personas ('How people use Craft') and community templates; arrow-button paging on /templates featured row

micro_interactions.details: hover lift/brighten on pill buttons; segmented pill toggles (Yearly/Monthly, Grid/List); nav glass re-tint on scroll

webgl_3d.note: 3D award trophies and puffy icons are pre-rendered images

scroll_effects.note: no parallax or scroll-driven animation detected; sections are statically laid out

text_effects.note: emphasis is typographic (serif italic), never animated

svg_animations.note: SVG used for noise filter and sketchy icons, all static
